inspirationSources.source: High-fashion editorial magazine layouts (Vogue, W Magazine)
inspirationSources.elementsBorrowed: Multi-column content flow, generous whitespace, serif headline typography, kicker/standfirst/pullquote hierarchy
inspirationSources.adaptation: Applied magazine editorial structure to a data-driven SPA. Kickers label each section, headlines use Cormorant Garamond italic for emphasis, standfirst paragraphs provide context in muted tones.

inspirationSources.elementsBorrowed: Flowing ink particle aesthetic, ink-blur SVG filters, dark backgrounds with luminous accents
inspirationSources.adaptation: Canvas-based ink particle drift creates ambient background texture. SVG connection lines use Gaussian blur filter to simulate ink bleeding on paper. Dark palette (#0a0a14) serves as wet black paper.

inspirationSources.source: Swiss typographic design / International Typographic Style
inspirationSources.elementsBorrowed: Systematic grid layout, monospace numbering, strict typographic hierarchy with editorial kicker-headline-standfirst pattern
inspirationSources.adaptation: Navigation uses numbered items (01-10) in monospace. Content follows strict editorial hierarchy. Grid system is systematic but softened with generous spacing.

inspirationSources.source: Cinematic title sequences (Saul Bass, Kyle Cooper)
inspirationSources.elementsBorrowed: Three-layer ink wash page transitions with staggered timing, dramatic reveal animations
inspirationSources.adaptation: Page transitions use three CSS layers that sweep across the viewport with staggered delays, creating a cinematic wipe effect reminiscent of film title sequences.

inspirationSources.source: Fullscreen overlay navigation (Stripe, Apple special events)
inspirationSources.elementsBorrowed: Hidden hamburger revealing full-screen navigation with large typography and radial gradient backgrounds
inspirationSources.adaptation: Navigation is completely hidden behind a circular hamburger button. When opened, a full-viewport overlay reveals all 10 views with large serif typography, ink-wash gradient background, and editorial masthead.

uniqueDesignElements: Fullscreen overlay menu with dual radial ink-wash gradients and editorial masthead (Issue VII, Vol. VII, No. 1)
Three-layer cinematic ink wash page transition with staggered CSS transforms
Editorial two-column spread header with pullquote on dashboard
Magazine-style kicker + headline + standfirst typographic hierarchy across all views
Canvas-based ambient ink particle drift with dual-color lifecycle particles
Ink ripple click feedback with JS-created gradient splash elements
Spring-eased mercury toggle switches using CSS cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)
Monospace numbered navigation items (01-10) with ink underline draw animation
SVG connection lines with feGaussianBlur ink-bleed filter
Staggered scroll reveal with per-element index-based delay calculation

navigation.pass3: Minimal top bar + command palette modal
navigation.pass6: Recessed left rail with engraved items
navigation.pass7: Hidden hamburger with fullscreen overlay menu — completely hidden navigation revealed by a single button, editorial magazine menu layout

contentFlow.pass7: Editorial columns — magazine-spread layout with multi-column content, editorial typographic hierarchy, generous whitespace

motionLanguage.pass7: Cinematic fade with vanilla JS — no external animation libraries, three-layer ink wash transitions, staggered CSS reveals

typography.pass7: Cormorant Garamond + Inter — italic serif for editorial emphasis, paired with clean sans-serif body

palette.pass7: Midnight ink (#0a0a14) with medium slate blue (#7b68ee) and caribbean green (#00d4aa) — unique purple-green accent pairing on near-black

density.pass7: Spacious — generous editorial whitespace, magazine-grade breathing room between sections
